response.justification: Bogdan has deep full-stack engineering experience across diverse domains and demonstrates strong technical craftsmanship, including AI-agent infrastructure work and open-source contributions, but lacks explicit evidence of cloud/AI platform strategy leadership, formal AI product ownership, or director-level influence required for this role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across cloud, AI-agent systems, and infrastructure
Proven ability to build and lead open-source technical platforms with real-world adoption
Strong technical depth in DLang, Node.js, and systems design with measurable impact
concerns: No clear evidence of AI product strategy or cloud platform vision at scale
Lacks documented leadership in cross-functional AI initiatives or strategic customer advisory
No advanced degree in AI or related field, and startup experience is volunteer/individual, not organizational
